button.class: btn btn-outline-secondary sis-lobby-btn px-5 py-4 fs-5
btn btn-outline-secondary sis-lobby-btn px-5 py-4 fs-5
btn btn-outline-secondary sis-lobby-btn px-5 py-4 fs-5
btn btn-outline-secondary sis-lobby-btn px-5 py-4 fs-5

div.class: d-flex align-items-center px-3 py-2 bg-white border-bottom shadow-sm
d-flex align-items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 bg-light border-bottom flex-wrap

label.class: form-label mb-0 text-nowrap small fw-semibold text-primary

ul.class: nav nav-tabs px-3 pt-2 bg-white border-bottom

a.t-att-class: state.partyTab === 'general' ? 'nav-link active py-1 px-3' : 'nav-link py-1 px-3 text-secondary'
state.partyTab === 'defaults' ? 'nav-link active py-1 px-3' : 'nav-link py-1 px-3 text-secondary'
state.partyTab === 'shipment' ? 'nav-link active py-1 px-3' : 'nav-link py-1 px-3 text-secondary'
state.partyTab === 'bank' ? 'nav-link active py-1 px-3' : 'nav-link py-1 px-3 text-secondary'

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-link p-0 text-decoration-none small

tr.td: No bank records. Please define them via the standard Odoo Contact view.

div.class: d-flex align-items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 border-top bg-light
d-flex align-items-center px-3 py-2 bg-white border-bottom shadow-sm
d-flex align-items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1 bg-light border-bottom flex-wrap
d-flex align-items-center gap-3 px-3 py-1 bg-light border-bottom flex-wrap

ul.class: nav nav-tabs px-3 pt-1 bg-white border-bottom

a.t-att-class: state.docTab === 'general' ? 'nav-link active py-1 px-3' : 'nav-link py-1 px-3 text-secondary'
state.docTab === 'items' ? 'nav-link active py-1 px-3' : 'nav-link py-1 px-3 text-secondary'
state.docTab === 'order' ? 'nav-link active py-1 px-3' : 'nav-link py-1 px-3 text-secondary'
state.docTab === 'shipment' ? 'nav-link active py-1 px-3' : 'nav-link py-1 px-3 text-secondary'
state.docTab === 'child' ? 'nav-link active py-1 px-3' : 'nav-link py-1 px-3 text-secondary'
state.docItemsTab === 'general' ? 'nav-link active py-1 px-2 small' : 'nav-link py-1 px-2 small text-secondary'
state.docItemsTab === 'instructions' ? 'nav-link active py-1 px-2 small' : 'nav-link py-1 px-2 small text-secondary'
state.docItemsTab === 'sizes' ? 'nav-link active py-1 px-2 small' : 'nav-link py-1 px-2 small text-secondary'
state.docItemsTab === 'weights' ? 'nav-link active py-1 px-2 small' : 'nav-link py-1 px-2 small text-secondary'
state.docItemsTab === 'profit' ? 'nav-link active py-1 px-2 small' : 'nav-link py-1 px-2 small text-secondary'

div.class: d-flex align-items-center gap-1 px-3 py-2 border-top bg-white flex-wrap
